Step.Obj: Service: Set Max Html Param Len
Step.Details: Maximum length of a HTML string that can be retrieved and saved set to 9999 characters

NodeArgs.Disp: Service: Set Max Html Param Len

Step.Details: Text=Please enter your username and password.

ParamName =c_cardNumber
Left Boundary = LB=input name="order.creditCard" type="text" value="
Right Boundary = RB="
Instance = Ord=1

ParamName =c_cardExpiry
Left Boundary = LB=input name="order.expiryDate" type="text" value="
Right Boundary = RB="
Instance = Ord=1

ParamName =c_firstName
Left Boundary = LB=input name="order.billToFirstName" type="text" value="
Right Boundary = RB="
Instance = Ord=1

ParamName =c_lastName
Left Boundary = LB=input name="order.billToLastName" type="text" value="
Right Boundary = RB="
Instance = Ord=1

ParamName =c_city
Left Boundary = LB=input name="order.billCity" type="text" value="
Right Boundary = RB="
Instance = Ord=1
Text=Thank you, your order has been submitted.
